Package: Boost
Repository: https://github.com/boostorg/boost.git
Checked on: 2026-03-24 UTC
Checked-out commit: 460b20ab28cc

Current public vulnerability status:
- No published repository-level security advisories were visible on the Boost security page as of 2026-03-24.
- Historical public vulnerability to keep in scope: CVE-2019-6246. NVD describes an out-of-bounds read / access violation in SVG++ code used with Boost GIL.
- The "no current advisories" statement is an inference from the repo security page. It is not proof that every Boost sublibrary has no historical or downstream vulnerability exposure.

Notes:
- Boost is a super-project spanning many libraries. Review of individual sublibraries may still be required for production intake.

Sources:
- https://github.com/boostorg/boost/security
- https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2019-6246
